skills.name: LCA Search
skills.description: 搜索 12 个 LCA 数据库，查找碳足迹、排放因子、环境影响数据集，返回 GWP 值和数据源
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Feedback
skills.description: 提交 bug 报告和功能建议到 GitHub Issues，帮助改进 Cortex
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Excel
skills.description: 读写 Excel/CSV 表格、数据清洗、公式计算、图表生成
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: PDF
skills.description: PDF 读取、合并、拆分、OCR、加水印、表单填写、加密解密
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Word
skills.description: 创建、编辑、读取 Word 文档，支持目录、页眉、批注、修订
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: PowerPoint
skills.description: 创建、编辑、读取 PPT 演示文稿，支持模板、布局、备注
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: 生成高质量前端界面：网页、组件、看板、海报、Landing Page
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Product Knowledge
skills.description: 查询 HiQ Cortex 产品能力、功能规格、使用方式
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Theme Factory
skills.description: 为幻灯片、文档、报告、HTML 应用主题样式：配色、字体、布局
skills.author: Anthropic

skills.name: LCA Format Validator
skills.description: 解析和校验 LCA 数据包（ILCD XML、openLCA JSON-LD、TIDAS），格式转换和内容检查
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: BOM Analysis
skills.description: 分析 BOM 物料清单：去重、分类、缺失检测、单位统一、LCA 匹配准备度评估
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Data Quality Assessment
skills.description: LCA 数据质量评估：Pedigree Matrix / PEF DQR / ILCD DQI 评分，数据集代表性分析
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: CBAM Compliance
skills.description: EU CBAM 碳关税合规指南：产品范围识别、排放计算、数据需求、默认值、申报要求
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: Scope 3 Guidance
skills.description: GHG Protocol Scope 3 指南：15 类排放分类、边界判定、计算方法、数据收集模板
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: openLCA Bridge
skills.description: 连接本地 openLCA 2.x，导入数据、建产品系统、运行 LCIA 计算（ReCiPe / CML / EF 3.0）
skills.author: HiQ

skills.name: LCA Consultant
skills.description: 搜索前的专业引导：帮你判断材料的工艺路线、地区、系统模型，给出按钮选项，确认后再搜索
skills.author: HiQ
